title: CandidateManifest
description: Schema for a dry-lab candidate manifest — a machine-readable artifact describing a candidate AMP sequence, its scores, evidence level, scopes, safety flags, and provenance. Dry-lab only — does not measure biological activity.

sequence.description: Amino acid sequence of the candidate AMP

evidence_level.description: Proof-ladder evidence level (1=computational nomination, 2=virtual-assay support, 3=in-silico ensemble agreement, 4=ex-vivo preliminary, 5=in-vivo preliminary, 6=clinical evidence)

scopes.description: List of biological scopes this candidate is assessed for (e.g. bacterial_binding, anti_fungal)

scores.description: Dictionary of named score values from pipeline modules

uncertainty.description: Overall uncertainty estimate (0.0 = fully certain, 1.0 = fully uncertain)

source_modules.description: List of pipeline modules or scorers that produced this manifest

calibration_set.description: Optional identifier for the calibration dataset used

safety_flags.description: List of safety flags (empty array = no flags raised)

provenance_run_id.description: Optional run ID linking this manifest to a specific pipeline execution

dry_lab_only.description: Must be true — this is a dry-lab computational artifact

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of manifest creation
